# Scale Partners UAE

> Scale Partners is a UAE corporate advisory firm supporting company formation, licensing, residency visas, banking preparation, tax, accounting, renewals, and compliance in Dubai and across the United Arab Emirates.

Official website: https://scalepartners.ae

Information on the website is general guidance. Government requirements, authority fees, timelines, and eligibility can change; confirm current details with a Scale Partners advisor.

## Company

- [About Scale Partners](https://scalepartners.ae/about-us): Company background and advisory approach.
- [Contact Scale Partners](https://scalepartners.ae/contact): Consultation and contact information.

## Business Setup

- [Business Setup in Dubai](https://scalepartners.ae/business-setup-dubai): Overview of UAE company formation options.
- [Mainland Company Setup](https://scalepartners.ae/setup-mainland): Dubai mainland licensing and company formation.
- [Free Zone Company Setup](https://scalepartners.ae/setup-freezone): UAE free zone formation options.
- [Offshore Company Setup](https://scalepartners.ae/setup-offshore): Offshore structures and use cases.

## Visas and Financial Services

- [UAE Golden Visa](https://scalepartners.ae/visa-golden): Golden Visa pathways and support.
- [UAE Residence Visa](https://scalepartners.ae/visa-residence): Investor, partner, and residence visa guidance.
- [PRO and Government Services](https://scalepartners.ae/visa-pro): Immigration and government liaison support.
- [UAE Corporate Tax](https://scalepartners.ae/finance-tax): Corporate tax registration and compliance guidance.
- [Accounting Services](https://scalepartners.ae/finance-accounting): Bookkeeping and accounting support.
- [Corporate Banking](https://scalepartners.ae/finance-banking): Business bank account preparation and support.

## Free Zones

- [Meydan Free Zone](https://scalepartners.ae/fz-meydan): Meydan company setup information.
- [IFZA Dubai](https://scalepartners.ae/fz-ifza): IFZA company setup information.
- [DMCC](https://scalepartners.ae/fz-dmcc): DMCC licensing, offices, visas, and compliance.
- [Shams](https://scalepartners.ae/fz-shams): Sharjah Media City company setup information.
- [RAKEZ](https://scalepartners.ae/fz-rakez): RAKEZ business and industrial setup information.
- [DWTC](https://scalepartners.ae/fz-dwtc): Dubai World Trade Centre company setup information.

## License Types

- [E-Commerce License](https://scalepartners.ae/lic-ecommerce): Online retail and e-commerce licensing.
- [General Trading License](https://scalepartners.ae/lic-trading): Import, export, and trading licensing.
- [Commercial and Service License](https://scalepartners.ae/lic-commercial): Consulting and service business licensing.
- [Media License](https://scalepartners.ae/lic-media): Media and creative business licensing.
- [Industrial License](https://scalepartners.ae/lic-industrial): Manufacturing and industrial licensing.
- [Holding Company](https://scalepartners.ae/lic-holding): Holding company and SPV structures.

## Optional

- [UAE Company Setup Cost Calculator](https://scalepartners.ae/calculator): Interactive estimate for company formation costs.
- [Privacy Policy](https://scalepartners.ae/privacy-policy): Website privacy practices.
- [Terms and Conditions](https://scalepartners.ae/terms-and-conditions): Website usage terms.
